harbor.trial_lock_reuse: Harbor lock.json binds Harbor, task, agent, model, and injected skill digests; reports must import those bindings rather than reconstruct them.

image.digest_requirement: Record the local image ID and any RepoDigest before the first model call.

verifier.hard_locator_policy: Hash raw authoritative bytes first, normalize CRLF to LF for the derived record join, and remove only terminal publication blank lines when the exact evidence range reaches EOF.

pi_authentication.mode: ephemeral per-job directory copy with auth.json mode 0600

network.agent_environment_setup: public because built-in Pi installs curl, NVM, Node, and the pinned npm package
network.verifier_isolation: separate container; no knowledge, model-cache, or authentication mounts; grader performs no network operations
network.reason: Harbor 0.18.0 egress sidecar fails to start for both allowlist and no-network policies on the current WSL Docker host.
network.compatible_host_option: Regenerate with --agent-network-mode allowlist --verifier-network-mode no-network only after a disposable smoke succeeds.

attempts.retry_policy: Retry transport or rate-limit failures only; never retry contract, semantic, retrieval, or grounding failures.

paired_change: For each family and question, baseline and evolved jobs differ only in the installed frozen skill snapshot.
